textPlain: Technically, Big Ben is the bell, not the clock, from the article as well:> A common misconception is referring to the entire tower as Big Ben, when in fact, that's just the name of the bell. Andrew clarified: "So it's The Great Clock inside the Elizabeth Tower that rings Big Ben."
Time change was last week in London :)
And they say no man can stop the march of time.
You're saying this man can stop the march of time? Or of a clock?
